title: helianthemum aguloi
intro: Helianthemum aguloi, also known as the Agul's rockrose, is a species of flowering plant in the rockrose family (Cistaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Helianthemum aguloi include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. Traditionally, it is prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and can also be used topically to treat skin conditions such as wounds and eczema.
